pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 8, 112 confirm this directory is created

setup_task.sh lines 52, 57, 62, 67 show 9.80665, 299792458 (line 57), 1.380649e-23, and 6.02214076e23 all present in PhysicsConstants.java. Metadata is incomplete - missing Avogadro's number (6.02214076e23)

setup_task.sh lines 79, 83, 87, 91 show 1.60934, 0.453592, (1.8 and 32.0 on line 87), and 0.3048. Metadata is incomplete - missing 1.8 (Celsius scale factor) and 0.3048 (feet to meters). Note: export_result.sh line 65 includes 1.8 in its target_literals list
setup_task.sh lines 105, 110, 114 show 3.986004418e14, 6371000, and 86400.0 (seconds in a day). Metadata is incomplete - missing 86400.0
setup_task.sh lines 126, 130, 134, 138 show 8080, 30000, 3, and 8192. Metadata is incomplete - missing 8192 (standard buffer size)
Confirmed as standard gravity acceleration (m/s²) by NIST and Wikipedia

Earth's mean radius in meters (6,371 km), confirmed by Wikipedia and NIST

Common HTTP alternative port number
Connection timeout value in milliseconds (30 seconds)
Maximum retry count, present in NetworkConfig.java line 134
Standard buffer size (2^13), present in NetworkConfig.java line 138

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic Eclipse IDE refactoring exercise on a PhysicsCalc Java project located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/PhysicsCalc. The project contains 4 source files with hardcoded magic numbers requiring extraction into constants. All numeric constants are accurate and verified: speed of light (299792458 m/s), Boltzmann constant (1.380649e-23 J/K), standard gravity (9.80665 m/s²), Earth's gravitational parameter (3.986004418e14 m³/s²), Earth's mean radius (6371000 m), unit conversions (miles-km: 1.60934, pounds-kg: 0.453592, feet-m: 0.3048), and time/network values. However, the metadata's literals_to_remove lists are incomplete: PhysicsConstants.java is missing Avogadro's number (6.02214076e23); UnitConverter.java is missing the Celsius scale factor (1.8) and feet-to-meters conversion (0.3048); OrbitalMechanics.java is missing seconds-per-day (86400.0); NetworkConfig.java is missing buffer size (8192). The export_result.sh verifier script expands UnitConverter.java's list to include 1.8, creating inconsistency with task.json metadata.
